Texts.about_me: I'm a full-stack developer with some experience building real systems using Django, DRF (Django REST Framework), Laravel REST and React.
Texts.about_me2: I love working on projects where I can solve specific problems: Automize tasks, turn business logic into code, improve UI/UX and structure data efficiently.
Texts.currentlyLearning: Google Cloud Platform (GCP) on Google Skills

Education.title: Technologist In Software's Analysis and Development - SENA

Work.title: Freelancer
Work.observation: Worked as a freelance full-stack developer improving the appointment-booking flow for TumediBot.com using Laravel, Livewire, Vue, and Vuetify . I integrated the calendar with the backend and fixed UI and data handling issues across the platform

Work.title: EDL Ingenieros consultores SAS
Work.observation: Developed an internal platform for employee management, project tracking, and automated document generation using Django and React. I implemented secure authentication with JWT and OTP, built dynamic document templates with GrapesJS, also created the company’s landing page
